title: ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF CAMPIDICO, MAGSAYSAY, MARAGANO, NIPA, BAGACAY, MABARAS, BINAY, SUMOROY, SINALARAN, PAYSUD AND OSMEÃA, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PALAPAG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 591 / 55 OG No. 36, 7625 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2468, June 21, 1959 ]

ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF CAMPIDICO, MAGSAYSAY, MARAGANO, NIPA, BAGACAY, MABARAS, BINAY, SUMOROY, SINALARAN, PAYSUD AND OSMEÃA, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PALAPAG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Barrio Paysud, consisting of the sitios of Cabonga-an, Danao, Nabatasan and Darag; and

Barrio Osmena, consisting of the sitios of Capirisan, Carogyao, Bongcag, Gadgad, Borac, Hibatuan and Alibang-bang.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
